description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New listing (Posted: June 19, 2026)

【Event Details】

Date: August 4 (Tuesday)

Gathering time: 10:00 a.m.

Gathering place: West parking lot of Hanno City Hall

Route: Hanno City Hall → Yamate-cho nature walking trail entrance → Yatsutada regeneration area → Ninin Temple → Central Park → Hanno Riverbed → Hanno Station → Hanno City Hall

Distance: Approximately 8 kilometers

Estimated duration: Approximately 2 hours 30 minutes

Fee: 200 yen (insurance, etc.; collected on the day)

What to bring: Packed lunch, drinking water, rain gear, Sugo-Ashi handbook (if you have one)

Application: Apply to ASA Hanno by Friday, July 31. Phone: 042-972-4701, Fax: 042-974-2190

Cancellation check: If the event is cancelled due to weather or other reasons, confirm with ASA Hanno after 9:00 a.m. on the day of the event.

Inquiries: Onda, 090-2205-8073

Organizer: Hanno Walking Club

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/10590.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-Ashi Walking Event: August 4, 2026 (Tuesday) – Walk Tenranzan's Yatsutada and Hanno Riverbed's Tobi-ishi Bridge
